display.name: deployment_environment
display.description: The deployment environment for the service.

spec.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment_environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%hadoop_hdfs_%'

display.name: cluster
display.description: Hadoop cluster

spec.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%hadoop_hdfs_%'

display.name: Total blocks
display.description: Total number of blocks in the system at present.

display.name: NodeManager status
display.description: Number of NodeManagers in each status at present.

display.name: Capacity remaining per DataNode
display.description: Current capacity remaining per DataNode in bytes.

display.name: Completed
display.description: Number of applications that are in Completed status at present.

display.name: Corrupt blocks
display.description: Total number of corrupt blocks at present.

display.name: vCore usage
display.description: vCore usage

filter.expression: (deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND cluster = $cluster AND queue = 'root' AND status = 'Allocated')

display.name: Under replicated blocks
display.description: Total number of blocks under replicated at present.

display.name: Volume Failures
display.description: Total volume failures at present.

display.name: Pending replication blocks
display.description: Total number of blocks pending to be replicated at present.

display.name: Container by status
display.description: Count of container in each status at present.

display.name: Num blocks
display.description: Total number of blocks in the live nodes at present.

display.name: Running
display.description: Number of applications that are in Running status at present.

display.name: Application count
display.description: Total application count in each status at present.

display.name: Missing blocks
display.description: Total number of missing blocks at present.

display.name: Memory used
display.description: The total amount of memory currently used on the host.

display.name: Killed
display.description: Number of applications that are in Killed status at present.

display.name: Submitted
display.description: Number of applications that are in Submitted status at present.

display.name: Total vCores
display.description: Total number of vCores at present.

display.name: Live DataNodes
display.description: Live DataNodes at present.

display.name: Memory usage
display.description: Memory usage

filter.expression: (status = 'Allocated' AND queue = 'root' AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment)
(status = 'Available' AND queue = 'root' AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment)

display.name: Remaining capacity in DataNodes
display.description: Current remaining capacity in DataNodes.

display.name: Total containers
display.description: Total number of containers currently running on the host

display.name: Dead DataNodes
display.description: Dead DataNodes at present.

display.name: Pending
display.description: Number of applications that are in Pending status at present.

display.name: Failed
display.description: Number of applications that are in Failed status at present.
